actions-list.actionItem: Pursuant to the order of Thursday, June 11, 2026,  the Journal of the proceedings of the Senate was deemed approved to date.
Pursuant to the order of Thursday, June 11, 2026, the morning hour being deemed expired, and the times for the recognition of the two leaders being reserved.
The following transactions of morning business occurred on today .

S.Res. 770 (Sen. Scott, of FL):
        A resolution designating June 6, 2026, as National Naloxone Awareness Day.

        -- Submitted in the Senate, considered, and agreed to without amendment and with a preamble by Unanimous Consent.

PN730-33:
        George Holding, of North Carolina, to be United States Director of the European Bank for Reconstruction and Development

        -- Motion to proceed to executive session to consideration of nomination agreed to in Senate by Voice Vote.

        -- Cloture motion presented in Senate.


 PN851-7:
        Justin D. Smith, of Missouri, to be United States Circuit Judge for the Eighth Circuit

        -- Considered by Senate.

        -- Confirmed by the Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 48 - 43. Record Vote Number: 172 



 PN901-8:
        Michelle Steel, of California, to be Ambassador to the Republic of Korea

        -- Motion to proceed to executive session to consideration of nomination agreed to in Senate by Voice Vote.

        -- Cloture motion presented in Senate.
Under the authority of the order of today, at  7:44 p.m, the Presiding Officer (Mr. Moreno in the chair) declared the Senate adjourned, under its order of today, until 10 a.m. tomorrow .
